<!-- Page Type: Socialphoto -->
<!-- Generated by SEOwlsClaw v0.1 | SEO with Owls Claw (See Owls Claw) -->

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{TITLE} — {DESCRIPTION}</title>
    <meta name="description" content="{DESCRIPTION_LENGTH_160_chars_max}">
    
    <!-- Schema: ImageObject or Article -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "ImageObject",
      "url": "{IMAGE_URL}",
      "caption": "{CAPTION_TEXT_ALTERNATE}",
      "license": "{LICENSE_URL_OR_CREDIT}"
    }
    </script>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- SOCIAL HEADER -->
    <header class="social-header">
        <h1>{H1_SHORT_TITLE_KEYWORD} — {SHORT_DESCRIPTION}</h1>
        <p class="platform-tag">{PLATFORM_NAME}</p>
    </header>

    <!-- ALT TEXT SECTION -->
    <section class="alt-text-section">
        <h3><strong>Alt Text for SEO & Accessibility</strong></h3>
        <p>{ALT_TEXT_DESCRIPTION_120_CHARS_MAX} — Optimized for search engines + screen readers</p>
    </section>

    <!-- CAPTION H5 Section -->
    <section class="caption-section">
        <h5>{H5_CAPTION_ENGAGING_KEYWORD}</h5>
        <p>{CAPTION_CONTENT_100_CHARS_MAX} — {CALL_TO_ACTION_BULLET}</p>
    </section>

    <!-- HASHTAGS H6 Section -->
    <footer class="hashtags">
        <h6>#hashtag_primary_keyword</h6>
        <h6>#hashtag_target_audience</h6>
        <h6>#hashtag_product_category</h6>
        <h6>#hashtag_trend_topic_2026</h6>
    </footer>

    <!-- LINK INTEGRATION -->
    <div class="link-integration">
        <a href="{PRODUCT_PAGE_LINK}">{BRAND_NAME_PRODUCT_LINK_TEXT}</a>
    </div>

</body>
</html>

<!-- Editing Guide: Change any {PLACEHOLDER} text directly in this file before generation -->
<!-- Photo posts focus on visual SEO with alt text, hashtags, and platform-specific formatting! -->
